title: Bulk RNA-Seq Teaching P. berghei
author: Otto, Thomas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This is a dataset that we use for a transcriptomics workshop. The species is Plasmodium berghei, a rodent malaria. A gene of known function was knocked out and the exercise is to define the function of that gene.
steps_raw: This is a dataset that we use for a transcriptomics workshop. The species is Plasmodium berghei, a rodent malaria. A gene of known function was knocked out and the exercise is to define the function of that gene.
